section.div: Source code of extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
Source extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
This script will fetch seasonal anime data from MyAnimeList (both Normal and Hentai) and Hentai anime data from NekoPoi and save it in a specified format.
This script will automatically rename any NekoPoi titles (well its for all video titles btw, but mainly used for NekoPoi)

Favorites genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Romance

div.div: A long-term collaboration project with studio ufotable for the video game Genshin Impact. Let's step into this vast magical world of adventure together!

Based on the erotic game by POISON.
The tutors of the main character, Masato, are "the sexually vicious sisters" he had known since childhood! Haruna Shinjo, the celebrity older sister, combines brains, a fine pair of eyebrows, and the worst kind of personality. Serina Shinjo, a college student with a selfish personality and body, is full of gaps. He is constantly mistreated by both of them, and is already fed up with his life. Then one day, Masato meets Sakiko Ichinose, the owner of the secret club "Gentildonna" and is handed a hypnosis device. Using the device, he is told that he can manipulate any person's mind and body at will.
(Source: Mediabank, translated)
Gaikotsu Kishi-sama, Tadaima Isekai e Odekakechuu II
The second season of Gaikotsu Kishi-sama, Tadaima Isekai e Odekakechuu.
Noumin Kanren no Skill Bakka Agetetara Naze ka Tsuyoku Natta.
Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life

Al Wayne loves farming — and we don’t mean the video game sim. He wants to be a literal farmer, but in the process of improving his agriculture skills, he somehow winds up maxing out his overall character stats! He’s superpowered in the most unexpected of ways with abilities even the strongest of heroes would envy. Alas, all he wants is an idyllic farmer's life, but with demons and monsters invading the realm, Al may have to take up the mantle of hero just to keep his dreams from withering away!
(Source: Sentai Filmworks)
Seven Knights Revolution: Eiyuu no Keishousha

Long ago, Heroes had saved this world. Many Heroes fought against the powers of Destruction and protected the world. Years in the future… The Heroes had disappeared as the years passed and those possessing their powers called Successors now have the fate of the world in their hands. One of the elite Successors known as the Seven Knights is fighting an army of the Destruction when she saves a boy named Nemo. During the battle, Nemo awakens the powers of a Hero even he didn't know about and displays his powers as a Successor. But his Hero is someone who no one knew and no one ever spoke of.
(Source: Crunchyroll)

Using her wit and vast knowledge of medicines and poisons alike, Maomao played a pivotal role in solving a series of mysteries and conspiracies that plagued the imperial court. Having recently come to terms with the secrets of her parents, she returns to fulfill her normal duties on behalf of the emperor's highest-ranking consorts. Maomao also works alongside the eunuch Jinshi to better the consorts' many ladies-in-waiting, including helping them learn to read.
However, with the arrival of a merchant caravan comes a new wave of intrigue. A pattern of strange coincidences involving the visitors and their wares unsettles Maomao, driving her to investigate the puzzling circumstances behind the convoy. As dangers from both outside and within threaten the balance between the imperial concubines, Maomao continues to utilize her cunning and medical expertise to keep the women safe from harm.
(Source: MAL Rewrite)

The second season of [Oshi no Ko]. Aqua’s desire for revenge takes center stage as he navigates the dark underbelly of the entertainment world alongside his twin sister, Ruby. While Ruby follows in their slain mother’s footsteps to become an idol, Aqua joins a famous theater troupe in hopes of uncovering clues to the identity of his father — the man who arranged their mother’s untimely death, and the man who once starred in the same troupe Aqua hopes to infiltrate. (Source: HIDIVE)
Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life

The story of Jii-san Baa-san Wakagaeru follows Shouzou and Ine, an elderly couple who are living a quiet life in a farming village in Aomori Prefecture. After eating a mysterious apple that they discover on their apple farm, Shozo and Ine spontaneously regain their youth, but even after being reinvigorated they continue to live life at a grandparent-ly pace. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)
Comedy, Drama, Hentai, Slice of Life
Still a virgin, I downloaded an app. [Welcome to 'The Heroine App'.]. I can get any girl I want with this app?! What am I waiting for? (Source: DAYcomics)

In a world where awakened beings called “Hunters” must battle deadly monsters to protect humanity, Seong Jin-U, nicknamed “the weakest hunter of all mankind,” finds himself in a constant struggle for survival. One day, after a brutal encounter in an overpowered dungeon wipes out his party and threatens to end his life, a mysterious System chooses him as its sole player: Jin-U has been granted the rare opportunity to level up his abilities, possibly beyond any known limits. Follow Jin-U’s journey as he takes on ever-stronger enemies, both human and monster, to discover the secrets deep within the dungeons and the ultimate extent of his powers. (Source: Tappytoon) Note: Includes 22 extra chapters.
Isekai de Cheat Skill wo Te ni Shita Ore wa, Genjitsu Sekai wo mo Musou Suru: Level Up wa Jinsei wo Kaeta

It’s time for the Ousei Academy camping trip! Yuuya and his classmates head into the wilderness, where they’ll need to build shelters, find food, and otherwise fend for themselves. Yuuya quickly steals the show (and several of his classmates’ hearts) after saving the day, thanks to his maxed-out survival skills! And back in the other world, the day Yuuya promised to meet Princess Lexia has arrived. But an ambush cuts their reunion short when Luna moves to complete her mission and assassinate the princess! As Yuuya recalls their time training together in the forest—and the bond they forged—will he be able to do what’s necessary to stop her…?
(Source: Yen Press)

He always thought he was just an ordinary guy, but he didn’t know that his yard was full of divine artifacts and the chickens he raised were actually phoenixes! It wasn’t until after five years of living in an ordinary village when the System finally allowed him to come into contact with cultivators. It was then that he discovered that no matter how strong someone was, the moment they saw him, they would be so intimidated that they would tremble in fear. Some would even kneel down and call him master…
(Source: Bilibili, translated)
